summary: Frontend-only testing of TransformationSection.jsx rewrite. All 6 specified requirements verified via Playwright + DOM inspection.

test_results.circle1_visible_at_entry: PASS - opacity:1 when section enters viewport
test_results.circles_234_ghost_dots: PASS - opacity:0 at section entry, no ghost dots
test_results.text_inside_circle: PASS - number 01, heading, divider, subtext all visually contained inside circle boundary (screenshot confirmed)
test_results.scroll_animation_one_circle_at_time: PASS - at 30% scroll: circle1=opacity:0, circle2=opacity:1, others=0; at 55% scroll: circle3=opacity:1, others=0
test_results.nerve_line_segments: PASS - seg12 visible as golden line when circle 2 shown (screenshot confirmed), separate segments working
test_results.no_ghost_dots: PASS - circles 2/3/4 completely opacity:0 at initial state

context_for_next_testing_agent: TransformationSection uses framer-motion sticky scroll. Section starts at ~3861px from top. Viewport 1280x800 used. Preloader takes ~4 seconds. Section is 400vh tall. All 6 requirements from the rewrite pass.
